subject: 05_REPORT_E12_001_epoch_report
reason: Mission was marked RATIFIED in queue but deliverable was never deployed to disk. Predates ledger system so original deployment failure is unrecorded. No imports reference the missing module, indicating quiet orphaning. Reverted to PENDING for eventual regeneration, but blocked until E14 benchmark gates are deployed to prevent regeneration through known-broken gates.

justification: E14 gate addressing E14_BACKLOG_004 empty_proposal_benchmark_pass: rejects proposals under 500 bytes or 20 lines or with zero function/class definitions before benchmark scoring runs

E14 gate addressing E14_BACKLOG_001 tier_loader_v5 OUTPUT_TRUNCATION: detects mid-method failures, unbalanced strings, model self-prompt token leaks (Qwen <|endoftext|> patterns), and trailing TODO placeholders before benchmark runs

E14 gate addressing E14_BACKLOG_002 preflight_runner_v5 HALLUCINATED_IMPORT_PATH: statically resolves every import via importlib.util.find_spec without executing modules, refuses proposals with unresolvable imports like the manticore.core.modules.doctor fabrication

E14 gate addressing E14_BACKLOG_001 and E14_BACKLOG_002 FUNCTION_NAME_DRIFT: parses brief INTERFACE CONTRACT section for expected function/class/constant names and verifies via AST walk that proposal defines each one exactly. No fuzzy matching, no substring matching, exact match only

issue: Four sovereign injections of the E14 gates ran within the same second-precision timestamp. The signature artifact filename collided and only the last signature (contract_name) survives on disk. Ledger entries remain correctly chained, but three of four signature byte-records were overwritten.
remediation_taken: Patched sovereign_inject_v2.py to use microsecond precision in future signature filenames. Cosmetic provenance gap acknowledged in chain. Chain integrity verified INTACT after collision.
trust_class_impact: NONE — gates remain VERIFIED, signatures were valid at injection time

justification: E14 wiring: benchmark_orchestrator now invokes MIN_SUBSTANCE, TRUNCATION, IMPORT_RESOLUTION, CONTRACT_NAMES gates before legacy hygiene/hallucination/logic pipeline. Any E14 gate failure short-circuits with score=0.0. Closes the loop opened by the four gate injections at 20:17 UTC. Backwards compatible via optional mission_file_path arg.

v3 permanent fix: find_deliverable_path now reads brief FIRST (sovereign-authored, deterministic) before proposal (model-authored). Extracts _find_path_in_text into reusable scanner that handles all known brief formats including DELIVERABLE section headers and backtick-wrapped paths. Root cause fix for zero-deploy issue across wilderness run v1 and v2.

v3.1 root cause fix: models generate bare Python after YAML frontmatter without markdown fences. extract_code_blocks now handles both fenced and unfenced code by splitting on YAML --- delimiter. This was the actual reason for 0 deploys across both wilderness runs.

subject: 03_ORCHESTRATION
empirical_basis: E19_006: meta-commentary ratification (brief review, not deliverable)
rationale: Three consecutive failures on orchestration-class ARCHITECTURE missions indicate Qwen3.5:9B at cruiser tier exceeds capability for this domain's complexity on available hardware. Heavy tier (qwen3.5:27b) has more reasoning capacity and is the empirically justified default.

failure_summary: Model produced three empty function stubs (initialize, route_intelligence, gear_box_process). Root cause was _queue_add brief corruption — model received 4-line stub instead of real brief.
note: Seed observation for MODEL_PROFILES when Phase 1 ships. Distinction between model-attributable and upstream-attributable failures preserved per Intelligence Router v2 design — models are not punished for upstream brief corruption.

failure_summary: Identical empty stubs as E19_003. Same upstream root cause (brief corruption at queue-add time).
note: Seed observation for MODEL_PROFILES when Phase 1 ships. Distinction between model-attributable and upstream-attributable failures preserved per Intelligence Router v2 design — models are not punished for upstream brief corruption.

failure_summary: Model received real 522-line architecture brief but produced a review of the brief instead of the deliverable. Opened with 'Thank you for submitting...', asked 'Would you like me to draft...', offered follow-up tasks.
note: Seed observation for MODEL_PROFILES when Phase 1 ships. Distinction between model-attributable and upstream-attributable failures preserved per Intelligence Router v2 design — models are not punished for upstream brief corruption.
